tools.name: search_semantic
tools.description:
Semantic search ‚Äî match by meaning, not exact words.

Uses vector similarity (cosine distance) over `text_pali` embedded with
a multilingual MiniLM model.

ü§î **In most cases you should use `search_hybrid` instead** ‚Äî it
combines this semantic search with keyword search and ranks better.

tools.name: search_hybrid
tools.description:
Hybrid search ‚Äî combines keyword + semantic search via RRF.

Uses Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) to merge exact-word results with
meaning-based results. **This is the recommended tool for "discourses
about X" / concept queries**, because the semantic side catches suttas
that discuss a concept using di

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "search_by_keyword" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Keyword search across the PƒÅli Tipi·π≠aka (trigram word-similarity). Searches the configured enabled language(s) on the server. Filterable by pitaka and translati‚Ä¶

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "open_sutta_viewer" stacks urgency/override words (important, always, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.
